texto: ...Sometimes they open it up like a package in the presence of a person they can talk to,' she said. 'Someone they can trust.' She held out her hands. 'Any person who is carrying a lot of sadness,' she said, 'needs to be able to rest sometimes, and to put it down.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Julia A. Schumacher: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “...Sometimes they open it up like a package in the presence of a person they can talk to,' she sa…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, blackbox, depression pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de depression e sadness.

frase_original: ...Sometimes they open it up like a package in the presence of a person they can talk to,' she said. 'Someone they can trust.' She held out her hands. 'Any person who is carrying a lot of sadness,' she said, 'needs to be able to rest sometimes, and to put it down.
